details: Develop and maintain full-stack web applications using React, AWS, Node.js, and MongoDB
Created and Implement unit tests for front and back end using Jest
Worked closely with QA and developers using Jira and GitHub
Resolve Jira tickets by implementing bug fixes and designing new features for the application
Utilized Microsoft SQL Server to construct customized curriculum solutions for numerous clients
Implemented database automation to streamline documentation of clients' sites, resulting in a 50% reduction in completion time
Designed catalogs for clients using a custom builder, HTML, and CSS
Conducted quality assurance by thoroughly testing hundreds of tickets for clients and performed end-to-end testing to ensure customer satisfaction
Collaborated with a multi-functional team in an Agile/Scrum environment
Redesigned policy service center with JavaScript and CSS to provide a more seamless experience for customers
Constructed a team report dashboard for the sales team in order to determine areas of interest and to better track performance
Designed and built a new website, My Agency System, to provide tools and resources to other insurance agencies
Boosted customer outreach and retention rates by creating and optimizing marketing automations
Developed and implemented email templates with JavaScript, resulting in improved communication with clients and increased productivity for the sales team
Developed modern and responsive websites for clients utilizing CSS, WordPress, Wix, and Divi
Created and interpreted website mockups using Figma, allowing for clear communication with the design team and efficient development of the final product
Remodeled client’s existing websites to be more appealing, functional, and user-friendly
